# הצרחן הנבון — כלים חכמים אך פשוטים לחיי יומיום
> Smart, simple tools for everyday life in Israel

## About
הצרחן הנבון (The Smart Screamer) is a collection of free web tools built by Samuel Dratwa (שמואל דרטבה), each solving a real everyday problem in Israel. All tools are free, privacy-respecting, and open for community suggestions.

## Tools

### מדד הצרחן הנבון (Tsarchan Food Price Index)
- URL: https://hamadad.sadot.click
- Daily Israeli food price index tracking 37 staple products across 8 supermarket chains
- Regional comparison across 5 areas in Israel
- Data from legally mandated public price filings (Kaggle)
- Base 100 = December 15, 2025

### מחשבון נסיעות במונית (Taxi Price Estimator)
- URL: https://il-taxi-price-estimator.sadot.click
- Calculates taxi fare in Israel based on distance, time, and current official tariffs (April 2026)
- Supports day/night/Shabbat tariffs and the new split-distance pricing
- Uses Google Maps for route calculation

### שבעתיים (ShivaTime)
- URL: https://shivatime.sadot.click
- Coordinates shiva (mourning) visits in Jewish communities
- Families publish visiting hours, visitors can mark when they plan to come
- Hebrew-first, designed with sensitivity for bereavement context

### סטטוס טיסה (FlightStatus)
- URL: https://flightstatus.sadot.click
- Multi-source flight status checker with majority-vote consensus
- Pulls from IAA (Israel Airports Authority), FlightRadar24, and Google
- No API keys required — uses publicly available data

### השוואת מסלולי חשמל (Smart Power Calc)
- URL: https://smart-power-calc.sadot.click
- Compares electricity discount plans from 7 alternative providers in Israel
- Users upload their IEC smart meter CSV — all processing happens client-side
- Includes consumption analysis and anomaly detection

## Blog
- URL: https://sadot.click/blog
- Posts explaining the story behind each tool, technical decisions, and general interest topics
- Written in Hebrew

## Community Ideas
- URL: https://sadot.click/ideas
- Public idea board for suggesting new tools or improvements
- Anyone can submit ideas or claim projects to work on

## Contact
- URL: https://sadot.click/contact
- Email: samuel.dratwa@gmail.com
